/usr/bin/ar qc libtsq_ui.a CMakeFiles/tsq_ui.dir/AudioSettingsComponent.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tsq_ui.dir/DetailEditorComponent.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tsq_ui.dir/DiagnosticsComponent.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tsq_ui.dir/HarmonicHeaderComponent.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tsq_ui.dir/InspectorComponent.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tsq_ui.dir/MainComponent.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tsq_ui.dir/MainWindow.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tsq_ui.dir/ModuleInfo.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tsq_ui.dir/PianoRollComponent.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tsq_ui.dir/PluginBrowserComponent.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tsq_ui.dir/ScalePaletteComponent.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tsq_ui.dir/StatusBarComponent.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tsq_ui.dir/TimelineComponent.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tsq_ui.dir/TrackListComponent.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tsq_ui.dir/TransportComponent.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tsq_ui.dir/__/__/deps/JUCE/modules/juce_gui_basics/juce_gui_basics_2.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tsq_ui.dir/__/__/deps/JUCE/modules/juce_gui_basics/juce_gui_basics_3.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tsq_ui.dir/__/__/deps/JUCE/modules/juce_gui_basics/juce_gui_basics_4.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tsq_ui.dir/__/__/deps/JUCE/modules/juce_gui_basics/juce_gui_basics_5.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tsq_ui.dir/__/__/deps/JUCE/modules/juce_gui_basics/juce_gui_basics.mm.o CMakeFiles/tsq_ui.dir/__/__/deps/JUCE/modules/juce_graphics/juce_graphics_Harfbuzz.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tsq_ui.dir/__/__/deps/JUCE/modules/juce_graphics/juce_graphics_Sheenbidi.c.o CMakeFiles/tsq_ui.dir/__/__/deps/JUCE/modules/juce_graphics/juce_graphics.mm.o CMakeFiles/tsq_ui.dir/__/__/deps/JUCE/modules/juce_events/juce_events.mm.o CMakeFiles/tsq_ui.dir/__/__/deps/JUCE/modules/juce_core/juce_core_CompilationTime.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tsq_ui.dir/__/__/deps/JUCE/modules/juce_core/juce_core.mm.o CMakeFiles/tsq_ui.dir/__/__/deps/JUCE/modules/juce_data_structures/juce_data_structures.mm.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libtsq_ui.a
